channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lawmakers demand answers after report of ICE officer shooting in Maine
item.description: Democratic lawmakers are seeking explanations regarding Homeland Security's vetting and training of immigration enforcement officers.

item.title: President Trump delivers national address on election claims
item.description: Ahead of the midterm elections, President Trump gave a primetime speech on election security, following years of unsubstantiated claims about the 2020 election.

item.title: Shippers face worst-case scenario as US and Iran intensify attacks
item.description: An industry analyst says no one is willing to transit the Strait of Hormuz as US-Iran hostilities escalate 140 days into the war.

item.title: Trump addresses elections, claims Chinese access to voter data
item.description: President Trump delivered a primetime address on elections tonight, maintaining his focus on the 2020 race.
